title: Cooling fan intermittent failure
recommended_action: Reduce throttle; inspect fan relay at next stop

title: Wheel bearing temperature elevated
recommended_action: Monitor bearing temps; schedule inspection within 48h

title: GPS telemetry drift detected
recommended_action: Verify antenna connection; recalibrate at next maintenance window

title: Cooling system pressure variance
recommended_action: Limit load to 80%; dispatch maintenance crew if pressure drops

title: Axle vibration threshold exceeded
recommended_action: Reduce speed to 40 mph; inspect axle bearings immediately

title: Telematics unit firmware outdated
recommended_action: Schedule firmware update at next yard stop
